articles.title: Operation Sindoor 2.0: How the army is preparing for the next battle
articles.description: India's Army is undergoing a significant transformation post-Operation Sindoor, shifting towards preemptive, technology-driven deterrence. New formations like Rudra Brigades and Bhairav battalions, alongside integrated drone units, are enhancing combat readiness. This modernization focuses on unmanned systems, AI, and rapid response, reflecting a decisive move from manpower-heavy tactics to a high-tech, multi-domain force.

articles.title: Vadodara's GSV: A unique transport university boosting Gujarat's growth
articles.description: Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya in Vadodara is India's first central university for transport and logistics. It fosters innovation through industry collaborations, offers diverse courses, and boasts high placement rates, contributing to India's development.

articles.description: COMEDK UGET 2026 counselling registration is now open for engineering and architecture admissions. Students who cleared the exam must register online and verify documents. Over 150 colleges in Karnataka will participate. Candidates can choose preferred colleges and courses. Seat allotment will occur in multiple rounds. Students must pay the total fee after securing a seat

articles.title: AI costs spiral as firms lose spending control
articles.description: Companies are facing massive AI bills, with one firm reportedly spending $500 million in a month on Claude AI due to unchecked usage. Several global firms are now cutting back on AI spending, changing pricing, or rehiring engineers to manage ballooning costs, as AI currently costs more than it saves.

articles.title: HC ruling on Google keyword ads likely to reshape e-advertising
articles.description: A Delhi High Court ruling has stopped Google from auctioning trademarked names as ad keywords. This decision impacts how companies advertise online. Established brands are set to benefit. Smaller companies may face challenges in gaining visibility. The ruling could reshape digital advertising strategies across various sectors in India.

articles.title: DH Toon | Fail all you want; just never admit it!
‘Make everyone drive an ambulance first’: Pune cab driver’s idea leaves US founder stunned
articles.description: An Uber driver in Pune, with 11 years of ambulance experience, shared a profound idea with a US founder: make new drivers operate an ambulance for a week before getting a license. This experience, he argued, would instill a life-or-death urgency, fostering greater road discipline and awareness than any standard test.

articles.description: It’s safe to say that the Cosmic Orange colorway of the iPhone 17 Pro series is a major hit, so much so that most Android makers have repeatedly launched similar-looking hues on their own devices. But as popular as it is, it seems that the bright orange color will not be making its way to the iPhone 18 Pro series. We’ve seen leaks of the upcoming Pro iPhones' updated color palette, and we now have our best look yet, thanks to Sonny Dickson, who shared images of the iPhone 18 Pro dummy units.
